2606.08982.title: Baichuan-M4: A Clinical-Grade Medical Agent System for Continuous Care
2606.08982.paper_summary: Baichuan-M4 is Baichuan Intelligence's clinical-grade medical large model, designed for \emph{continuous care} rather than single-turn medical question answering. It is built as a coordinated medical agent system around three pillars: \textbf{Baichuan-Harness}, a unified runtime that keeps reinforcement-learning training and real-world deployment consistent while enforcing action constraints, tool use, long-term patient memory, and multi-agent coordination; a \textbf{core reasoning model} trained with a continuous-care reinforcement-learning framework that integrates span-level reward modeling (SPAR++), reasoning-path compression, curriculum learning, and stabilized policy optimization; and a \textbf{clinical tool layer} for patient-memory management, authoritative evidence-based retrieval, and multimodal medical perception across documents, X-rays, and dermatology. On a cross-dimensional medical evaluation suite, Baichuan-M4 attains leading results in static medical knowledge and safety, dynamic OSCE-style consultation, long-context clinical memory, evidence-based retrieval, medical document OCR, and multimodal image understanding, while lowering the hallucination rate to 3.3\%.
2606.08982.paper_summary_zh: Baichuan-M4 是 Baichuan Intelligence 的臨床級醫療大型模型，旨在實現 \emph{持續護理} 而非單次醫療問答。它圍繞三個支柱構建為一個協調的醫療代理系統：\textbf{Baichuan-Harness}，一個統一的運行時，保持強化學習訓練和現實世界部署的一致性，同時強制執行行動約束、工具使用、長期病人記憶和多代理協調；一個 \textbf{核心推理模型}，使用持續護理強化學習框架訓練，整合跨度級獎勵建模（SPAR++）、推理路徑壓縮、課程學習和穩定的政策優化；以及一個 \textbf{臨床工具層}，用於病人記憶管理、權威的基於證據的檢索，以及跨文件、X 光片和皮膚病學的多模態醫療感知。在一個跨維度的醫療評估套件中，Baichuan-M4 在靜態醫療知識和安全性、動態 OSCE 風格諮詢、長上下文臨床記憶、基於證據的檢索、醫療文件 OCR 和多模態圖像理解方面達到了領先的結果，同時將幻覺率降低到 3.3\%。
2606.08982.author: Aiyuan Yang et.al.
2606.08982.authors: Aiyuan Yang, Chengfeng Dou, Da Pan, Dian Wang, Fan Yang, Fei Deng, Fei Li, Guangwei Ai, Hui Liu, Hongda Zhang, Jinyang Tai, Kai Lu, Lijun Liu, Linwei Chen, Linyu Li, Meiqing Guo, Peidong Guo, Qiang Ju, Rihui Xin, Shuai Wang, XinKai Ma, Xudong Chen, Yichuan Mo, Canbin Piao, Leyi Pan, Yihe Luo, Zian Wang
